# Ethan Flow — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Ethan Flow, Software Engineer, Full-Stack Developer, and Founder of Jedidiah Digital.

## About

Ethan Flow is a software engineer based in Oregon with a B.S. in Computer Science from Oregon State University (Jun 2025). He specializes in full-stack development, building clean and efficient software solutions. He is also the founder of Jedidiah Digital, a web development agency.

## Skills

- Backend: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, Docker, AWS, Go
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Tailwind
- Systems & Networking: Linux, Git, Docker, CI/CD, Networking, Shell Scripting

## Projects

- Foodable: AI-driven full-stack web app for personalized food recommendations
- Playlist Partner: Spotify playlist remixer with algorithmic recommendations
- Image Editor: Python/OpenCV desktop app for real-time image editing
- Portfolio Site: Single-page React + Tailwind v4 portfolio
